name: Fulgent Genetics, Inc.
business: Fulgent Genetics provides laboratory services including anatomic pathology, precision diagnostics, and BioPharma services, and develops therapeutic product candidates for cancer using a novel nanoencapsulation platform. Its laboratory services are sold to insurance payors, institutional customers (hospitals, medical institutions, other laboratories, governmental bodies, large corporations), and patients who pay directly. Its therapeutic development business targets cancer treatments through proprietary drug delivery technology.
sellsTo: Institutional (hospitals, medical institutions, other laboratories, governmental bodies, large corporations)

exposures.sentence: We offer and develop flexible and affordable diagnostic and genetic tests and laboratory services designed to improve patient care and quality of life.

Our therapeutic development business is focused on developing product candidates for treating a broad range of cancers using a novel nanoencapsulation and targeted therapy platform designed to improve the therapeutic window and pharmacokinetic profile, or PK profile, of new and existing cancer drugs.

We have also made significant investment in digital pathology using artificial intelligence, or AI, technology, which allows us to digitize specimen slides instead of the traditional method of microscopy.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 2 trial for FID-007
catalysts.sentence: We have completed the patient enrollment and expect to complete the trial by early 2026.

catalysts.event: Announcement of interim findings for FID-007 Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: we anticipate announcing our interim findings for this trial in June 2026 and expect a full data readout by the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Full data readout for FID-007 Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: we anticipate announcing our interim findings for this trial in June 2026 and expect a full data readout by the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 registrational trial for FID-007
catalysts.sentence: Assuming favorable results, we plan to investigate FID-007 in a Phase 3 registrational clinical trial in patients diagnosed with H&N squamous cell carcinoma to initiate as early as the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Close of acquisition of Bako Diagnostics and StrataDx
catalysts.sentence: The acquisition is expected to close during the first half of 2026, subject to satisfying customary closing conditions, including regulatory approvals.
